title: Sawan Ki Ghata
actors: Manoj Kumar, Sharmila Tagore, Mumtaz Askari
plot: Gopal and Seema are two small children who live in a small town in India. Gopal lives with Bansilal, whom he believes is his father; the much wealthier Seema lives with her dad Rana, who disapproves of her friendship with Gopal. H...
